fresh_facts.claim: The US deployed approximately 2,500 Marines from the 31st Marine Expeditionary Unit and the amphibious assault ship USS Tripoli to the Middle East on March 13, 2026.
Additional US warships and up to 5,000 sailors and Marines were en route to the Middle East as of March 13, 2026.
President Trump announced on March 13, 2026, that US Central Command obliterated all military targets on Iran's Kharg Island in one of the most powerful bombing raids in Middle East history.
Israel intensified strikes on Hezbollah targets in Lebanon as of Friday, March 13, 2026, as part of the broader US-Israeli campaign against Iran.
US and Israeli strikes continued hitting targets inside Iran nearly two weeks into the war as of March 13, 2026.
A missile strike hit a helipad in the US Embassy compound in Baghdad on March 13, 2026.
A drone strike in northern Iraq on March 12, 2026, killed a French soldier.
Iran-aligned militias stepped up attacks on US and coalition bases as of March 13, 2026.
Iran continues attacking Persian Gulf shipping and energy infrastructure as of March 13, 2026.
Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth stated on March 13, 2026, that the US is managing Iranian attacks on Persian Gulf shipping and energy infrastructure.
Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian discussed de-escalation with Egypt's leader on Friday, March 13, 2026, emphasizing relations with Arab states.
Trump claimed on March 13-14, 2026, that the US has decimated most Iranian missiles and drones.
Trump tempered expectations for regime change in Iran on March 13, 2026.
US intelligence assessments indicate Iran's government remains structurally intact and stable despite ongoing geopolitical tensions and US-Israeli strikes.
Mojtaba Khamenei, son of the late Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, was appointed Supreme Leader on March 8, 2026, by the Assembly of Experts.
Ayatollah Ali Khamenei was killed in a US-Israel strike on February 28, 2026.
An elite counterterrorism unit (NOPO) was deployed to protect the new Supreme Leader around March 11, 2026.
Mojtaba Khamenei issued his first statement as Supreme Leader on March 12, 2026.
EU's Ursula von der Leyen called for a 'credible transition' in Iran in early March 2026.
China expressed support for Iran's sovereignty amid US-Israeli strikes as of early March 2026.
Pakistan urged restraint in the US-Israeli military campaign against Iran as of early March 2026.

regime_fall.current_status: US-Israeli bombing campaign has expanded to over 15,000 targets including Kharg Island oil infrastructure, with the 31st Marine Expeditionary Unit (2,500 Marines) deployed as the first significant ground force and additional 5,000 sailors and Marines en route. Mojtaba Khamenei, installed as Supreme Leader on March 8, maintains regime cohesion through elite security redeployment and defiant statements, but faces cascading military degradation, persistent infrastructure strikes, escalating ground force presence, and ongoing attacks by Iran-aligned militias on US-coalition bases.
regime_fall.last_major_event: President Trump announced on March 13, 2026, that US Central Command obliterated all military targets on Iran's Kharg Island in one of the most powerful bombing raids in Middle East history, while confirming deployment of the 31st Marine Expeditionary Unit and additional 5,000 sailors and Marines to the region.
